question.label: Broad reviews gap
question.name: When feedback is broad, what kind of direction is missing most?
question.description: Names the specific gap inside review feedback before moving on in the arc.

answer: I would like to grow faster in concept rationale, not just execution speed.

assessment.note: Names a specific missing direction in feedback — stronger guidance on concept rationale over execution speed — which is a strong clarity gap; also reveals a growth thread worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Expectation mismatch
new_queue.name: Where do your standards for good work differ from mine right now?

new_queue.label: Blocked practice
new_queue.name: What part of concept rationale feels hardest to improve right now?

new_queue.label: Next step
new_queue.name: What would better concept rationale look like in your work over the next few weeks?

issues: coverage: injected growth into next question (0 touches after turn 6)

history.answer_excerpt: When reviews are broad, I am not sure what to change first.
I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.
I want clearer examples of what excellent junior-level work looks like here.

Feedback has helped, though I still miss consistency under time pressure.
I sometimes focus on polish and lose sight of the core message.
